text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Preparations for the Hanshin Juvenile Fillies
went smoothly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day before the race.
By around noon, we had arrived at a hotel
not far from Hanshin Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Wow, there's a hotel way up here in the
mountains…!
choice_data_list: The view's amazing from the rooms.
The view's amazing from the rooms.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Really? Hehe, I wonder if you can see the
racecourse from there.
choice_data_list: (That's a relief… she seems happy.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With such a big race ahead, I just wanted to
lift her spirits, even a little, but that wasn't
the case…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
The view from the window changes
completely between night and morning…
It was so beautiful, and I was really moved!
choice_data_list: Feeling ready for the race now?
Feeling ready for the race now?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Of course! My first G1 race, I'm going to give
it everything I've got!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Oh, the elevator's here. Shall we?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(Whiiirrrr……
——Clunk!!)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Eep!?
…Did it just stop…?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Ah—!
Even the lights…!
choice_data_list: Let's contact the hotel staff.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I asked, it seemed they still didn't know
what caused the elevator to stop. We had no
choice but to wait.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, we were trapped inside for over
an hour before being freed. But, as luck would
have it…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Eh!?
The car can't come…?
choice_data_list: Looks like they're all out…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
What should we do…?
Will we make it in time…?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Should I run?
If I sprint down the mountain at full speed…!
choice_data_list: That's dangerous, I won't let you do it.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I know, but… if there's no other way,
I can do it. So—
choice_data_list: Buena, it's okay. Leave it to me!
Buena, it's okay. Leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are two things I need to solve: getting
Buena Vista there on time, and helping her
calm down.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Phew.
…Phew…
choice_data_list: (She's anxious…)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her lips purse slightly, her breathing turns
shallow. It's a small gesture, but—

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text: "…The race is starting… soon…"

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text: "…Phew… phew…"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's something I've seen since she was little,
a habit she shows without thinking whenever
she feels uneasy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being trapped in that dark elevator must've
shaken her more than she lets on. At this rate,
she won't be able to perform at her best…
choice_data_list: (How do I solve both at once…?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then it hit me.
It's a gamble, but if it works…
choice_data_list: Buena, let's take the cable car!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Haaah…!
We made it in time!
choice_data_list: We got lucky…!
We got lucky…!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There was a cable car near the hotel, and we
managed to catch it just as it was about to
depart. On top of that…

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A taxi the hotel called for us was waiting at
the station below, and we made it just before
the meeting time.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
But wow, I'm impressed you thought of that!
A cable car, of all things.
choice_data_list: I looked it up, thinking you might like it.
I looked it up, thinking you might like it.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Huh?
choice_data_list: The view was beautiful, wasn't it?
The view was beautiful, wasn't it?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
"…We made it on, but…
Do you think we'll make it in time…?"
choice_data_list: "…Hey, Buena. Look up."
"…Hey, Buena. Look up."

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
"Huh? ………Whoa…! There's still snow…
It's so dreamy… so beautiful…"

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…I see.
Because you were prepared…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Because you did so much for me, I'm able to
stand here and race.
choice_data_list: It was just luck.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Then that's luck you brought to me!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…From here on, it's my turn to bring home
the win.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. Leave it to me. I'll make it count,
for everything you've done.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Just like always, keep believing in me.
If you do… I know I can become stronger,
no matter how far I go.
